title: Famke Janssen on Nerve-Wracking Bond Audition, Breaking Ribs During Pierce Brosnan Fight Scene
summary: Appearing for a masterclass discussion on acting at Malta’s Mediterrane Film Festival, the veteran star dished on the Bond PR machine and how a psychic predicted she would one day work with Woody Allen.

title: Prime Video’s ‘Every Year After’ Renewed for Season 2
summary: Amy B. Harris returns as showrunner for the Prime Video series that will expand the Barry’s Bay universe and follow Fortune’s novel, ‘One Golden Summer.’

title: US Drillers Add Oil, Gas Rigs As Hormuz Transit Resumes
